titleStmt.title: SII 24.506: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 506. (A.R. No. 337 of 1952-53.) ĀRYABHAṬṬĀḶ-VĀŚAL, INNER WALL OF THE ŪÑJAL-MAṆḌPA, PROPER RIGHT OF THE ANNAMŪRTI SHRINE.

summary.p: Registers an endowment of land in Marudūr in Kīḻaimuṟi in Rājarājavaḷanāḍu and money for worship and offerings to Nāthamuni-Āḻvār on the day of his natal star Anusham once in six months by Aḻagiyamaṇavāḷaṉār of Bhāradvāja-gōtra, one of the Tambirāṉs reciting the Tiruvāymoḻi before the god, stipulating that the offerings be distributed among the Śrīvaishṇavas after the worship. The details of the date viz. Śaka 1510, Śarvadhārin, Vṛiśchika, ba. 6, Friday, Maghā correspond regularly to 1588 A.D. November 29, Friday, ·46; ·55. It was the first day of Dhanus.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrīman mahārājādhirāja rājaparameśvara śrīvīrapradāpa śrīvīra veṅkaṭapatidevamahā
rāyar pṛthivirājyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa śakābdam 1000 5 100 10 Itaṉmel cellā niṉṟa sarvatāri
samvatsarattu vṛścikanāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu ṣaṣṭhayum śukravāramum peṟṟa makānakṣatrattu nā
ḷ teṉkarai pāṇṭiya kulāśanivaḷanāṭṭu viḻāvaṟāviti vaḷanāṭṭut tiruvaraṅkat tiruppati
perumāḷ śrīraṅganāthadevar śrībhaṇṭārattukku Ittiruppati tiruvāymoḻi viṇṇappam
ceyyum tampirāṉmāril bhāradvājagotrattu Āpasthambasūtrattu nampi tiru vāḻ Aḻaki
yamaṇavāḷaṉāreṉ teṇṭaṉ samarppittu poliyūṭṭu śilāśāsanam paṇṇikkuṭuttapaṭi Aṭiyeṉu
ṭaiya Upaiyam Ārumāsam Orukkāl nātamuṉiāḻvār tirunakṣatram Aṉuṣa (nakṣa) nakṣatrattu
perumāḷ Orupaṭi tocai Amutu ceytaruḷi nātamuṉiāḻvār Amutu ceytaruḷi śrīvayiṣṇavarkaḷukku viṉi
yokam Āmpaṭikku poliyūṭṭākac cetta vaṭakarai rācarāca vaḷanāṭu kiḻaimuṟi marutūril cūriya nārā
yaṇar Ayyaṉ tiruveṅkaṭamuṭaiyār Uḷpiṭākaiyil nāṉ koṇṭuṭaiya tāṉa marutuṭaiyā
ṭṭam rūpāy ḍa� Inta nilam Iraṇṭumāvaraiyum perumāḷ śrībhaṇṭārattile Oppuk koṇṭu Inta
māvam Orunāḷ Oru paṭi tocai Amutu ceytaruḷa candrātidya varai
varum viṭṭavaṉ viḻukkāṭu viṇṇappañ ceyvāre putrapautra paramparai
Ituvum varkkam mutaliṭṭa poṉ 2 10 Intap poṉ Irupatuk
ṇam viḻukkāṭu vaṭṭi koṇṭum Inta nilattilu koṇṭu mā
ttiyavaraiyum naṭakkakaṭavātākavum Intap poliyūṭṭu śilāśāsa
ṉam Eḻutiṉamaikku śrīraṅganārāyaṇapriyan Eḻuttu § śubhamastu
Digital edition of SII 24.506 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
